'''Slenn''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] who served under the command of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].<ref name="GT" />

==Biography==
Vader had placed Slenn in charge of a [[Attack at Datar|military excursion]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] at the planet [[Datar/Legends|Datar]]. Slenn mobilized his fleet too quickly and the Rebels were alerted to the attack ahead of time. This was a costly mistake that Slenn would pay dearly for.<ref name="GT" />

The Imperial forces were technically victorious, since all the Rebels were killed. However, Slenn's forces failed to take any prisoners, which was their primary mission objective. As a result of his failures in leadership, the Vice Admiral was executed by the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] right hand agent, Darth Vader.<ref name="GT" />
